Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair to Succeed Powell** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

President Trump announced on January 30, 2026, the nomination of former Fed Governor **Kevin Warsh** to replace **Jerome Powell** as Federal Reserve Chair, whose term ends in May 2026[1][2]. Warsh, a 2006-2011 Fed veteran, edged out contenders like Kevin Hassett, Christopher Waller, and Rick Rieder[
